message:
feat(core): add topology orchestration service for native mux (ft-3681t.2.2)

Implement programmable topology management: layout templates, focus groups,
lifecycle-aware split/merge/swap/move/rebalance validation, template registry
with built-in defaults (side-by-side, primary-sidebar, grid-2x2, swarm-1+3),
and full audit trail. 40+ inline tests. Builds on lifecycle engine (ft-3681t.2.1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
